sourceTypeOriginalIP.description: Original intellectual property created by the world originator

sourceTypePublicDomain.description: Work derived from public domain source material

sourceTypeCollaborativeCommons.description: Work created collaboratively under shared ownership terms

canonicalStatusOfficial.description: Officially recognized as canon by the world originator

canonicalStatusCommunity.description: Recognized as canon by community consensus

canonicalStatusApocryphal.description: Not recognized as canon but preserved in the record
